children.heading: Bilateral agreements
children.label: a Bilateral agreements
children.text: The Corporation may provide support under subchapter II of this chapter in connection with projects in any country the government of which has entered into an agreement with the United States authorizing the Corporation to provide such support in that country.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Claims arising as a result of support provided under subchapter II of this chapter or under predecessor authority may be settled, and disputes arising as a result thereof may be arbitrated with the consent of the parties, on such terms and conditions as the Corporation may determine.

children.heading: Settlements conclusive
children.label: 2 Settlements conclusive
children.text: Payment made pursuant to any settlement pursuant to paragraph (1), or as a result of an arbitration award, shall be final and conclusive notwithstanding any other provision of law.

children.heading: Presumption of compliance
children.label: c Presumption of compliance
children.text: Each contract executed by such officer or officers as may be designated by the Board shall be conclusively presumed to be issued in compliance with the requirements of this chapter.

children.heading: Electronic payments and documents
children.label: d Electronic payments and documents
children.text: The Corporation shall implement policies to accept electronic documents and electronic payments in all of its programs.
the Corporation is obligated to consult with and collect input from current employees on plans to substantially reorganize the Corporation prior to implementation of such plan; and
the Corporation should consider preference, experience, and, when relevant, seniority when reassigning existing employees to new areas of work.
